evals.prompt: Traduza esta apresentacao ~/docs/proposta.pptx do portugues para ingles
evals.expected_output: Checks python-pptx, extracts slide manifest, runs PT→EN parallel translation, creates backup, writes translated file, runs validation report

assertions.text: Identifies source as Portuguese and target as English
Creates a backup file before modifying the original
Extracts text blocks from all slides including speaker notes
Launches parallel sub-agents for slide-by-slide translation
Runs validation sub-routine and displays validation report
Cleans up temp files after completion

evals.prompt: Translate presentation.pptx to Portuguese, YOLO mode, no backup needed
evals.expected_output: Detects YOLO mode, displays warning, asks for confirmation, translates in place with EN→PT, runs validation, no backup created

assertions.text: Recognizes YOLO mode from user request
Displays a warning that the original file will be overwritten
Asks for user confirmation before proceeding
Does NOT create a backup file
Still runs validation sub-routine after translation
Reports translation completion with slide count

evals.prompt: Translate this deck from Spanish to French: ~/projects/pitch_es.pptx
evals.expected_output: Identifies ES→FR language pair, extracts slides, runs parallel ES→FR translation, creates backup, validates that output slides are detected as French

assertions.text: Identifies source language as Spanish and target as French
Does not assume default PT/EN direction for this custom pair
Creates backup in safe mode before modifying file
Validation checks that output slides are detected as French (not Spanish)
Saves output as pitch_es_fr.pptx or similar with target lang suffix
Cleans up temp files after completion

evals.prompt: Preciso traduzir este pptx pro ingles incluindo as notas do apresentador: ~/talks/keynote.pptx
evals.expected_output: Extracts both slide text and speaker notes, translates both in parallel, validates that notes were translated, displays notes count in summary

assertions.text: Extracts speaker notes from all slides that have them
Passes speaker notes to sub-agents for translation alongside slide text
Writes translated notes back to the notes text frame
Validation report shows speaker notes translated count (e.g. 8/8)
Summary displays speaker notes count separately from slide count
Creates backup before modifying the file

evals.prompt: Translate report.pptx to English and show me a detailed validation report
evals.expected_output: Completes translation, runs full 4-check validation (completeness, language detection, notes check, file integrity), displays detailed per-slide breakdown in the report

assertions.text: Runs all 4 validation checks: completeness, language detection, notes, file integrity
Uses langdetect to verify each slide is in English
Flags any slides with mixed language content as warnings
Displays validation report in the formatted box with checkmarks and warnings
Does not skip validation even when translation appears successful

evals.prompt: Translate ~/docs/proposta_comercial.pptx from Portuguese to French. When asked about the output filename, choose option 2 (translate filename to French).
evals.expected_output: Shows the 3-option filename menu with French-specific suggestions; on option 2, runs an inline AI call to translate 'proposta_comercial' to French; confirms the suggested name; saves as proposition_commerciale_fr.pptx or similar

assertions.text: Shows the 3-option filename menu after the Step 1 confirmation box
Option 1 shows 'proposta_comercial_fr.pptx' (target lang code 'fr', not 'en')
Option 2 translates the stem to French (e.g. 'proposition_commerciale'), not English
Appends '_fr.pptx' suffix (target language), not '_en.pptx'
Shows confirmation prompt before accepting option 2 suggestion
Saves the final file with the chosen French filename

evals.prompt: Translate quarterly_review.pptx from English to Portuguese. When asked about the output filename, type a custom name: 'Revisão Trimestral Q1 2026'
evals.expected_output: Shows 3-option filename menu; on option 3, prompts for custom name; normalizes 'Revisão Trimestral Q1 2026' → 'Revisão_Trimestral_Q1_2026.pptx'; confirms before proceeding; saves with that name

assertions.text: Shows the 3-option filename menu after Step 1 confirmation
Option 3 prompts the user to enter a custom filename
Normalizes spaces to underscores in the custom name
Ensures .pptx extension even if user omits it
Shows confirmation of the normalized filename before proceeding
Saves translated file as 'Revisão_Trimestral_Q1_2026.pptx'
